---
title: "\'Annunciation, The\' by C.M.Yonge"
---

## \'Annunciation, The\' by C.M.Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1893
**Genre:** verse
**Format:** Poem in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 3:10 (April 1893) 65-67

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
